item.title: Replace JSON array string concatenation with jq -s in backlog add
item.intent: Replace the manual JSON array construction via string concatenation in a loop (ac_json building) with proper jq -s array construction to avoid potential escaping issues
steps: Find the string concatenation pattern that builds ac_json with manual comma insertion
Replace with printf and jq -s . to build the array safely
Verify AC entries with special characters (quotes, newlines) are handled correctly
acceptanceCriteria: No manual JSON array construction via string concatenation exists in the codebase
AC entries with quotes and special characters round-trip correctly
